commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Mattermost streaming policy and auto-reply partial metadata propagation so explicit Mattermost block streaming avoids draft preview collapse while preview finalization can use validated accumulated final-answer text.

PR surface: Source +108, Tests +158. Total +266 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main and v2026.5.28 always pass disableBlockStreaming: true on the Mattermost inbound path while the linked issue provides concrete Mattermost configs and observed overwrite behavior; I did not run a live Mattermost server in this read-only review.
